local GameVersion = require('Module:GameVersion')
local WikiAutomated = require('Module:WikiAutomated')

---@param version version? defaults to 'latest'
function p.getDataRoot(version)

        version = 'latest'
    end

    local ver = GameVersion.parseVersion(version, p['versions'])
    return mw.loadData('Module:Moons/Data/v' .. ver)

---@param version version? defaults to 'latest'
function p.getRawData(version)
    return p.getDataRoot(version)["data"]
end

---@param version version? defaults to 'latest'
function p.getData(version)
    local rawData = p.getRawData(version)

    local versionParsed = GameVersion.parseVersion(version, p.versions)
    local hasOverrideData, result = pcall(mw.loadData, 'Module:Moons/DataOverride')

    if hasOverrideData then
        local returnTable = rawData

        local defaultOverrideTable = result.default
        local versionOverrideTable = result[versionParsed]

        if defaultOverrideTable ~= nil then
            returnTable = WikiAutomated.tableExt.patch(returnTable, defaultOverrideTable)
        end

        if versionOverrideTable ~= nil then
            returnTable = WikiAutomated.tableExt.patch(returnTable, versionOverrideTable)
        end

        return returnTable
    else
        if not NO_OVERRIDE_DATA_WARNED then
            mw.log('Override data not found: ' .. result)
            NO_OVERRIDE_DATA_WARNED = true
        end

        return rawData
    end

function p.getMoonKeyIndex(moonKey)

    if idx == nil then

    end
    return idx

---@param input string|number
function p.getMoonKey(input)
    if type(input) == "number" and input > -1 then
        return MOON_KEY_INDEX_REVERSE[input]
    end

    local inputLowered = string.lower(input)

    for key, aliases in pairs(MOON_ALIASES) do
        if key:lower() == inputLowered then
            return key
        end

        for _, alias in ipairs(aliases) do
            if alias:lower() == inputLowered then
                return key
            end
        end
    end

    -- keys and aliases all looked, no matching input
    error("Cannot parse moon input: " .. input)
end

local p = {}

p['versions'] = { 35, 36, 37, 38, 40, 45, 47, 48, 49, 50, 55, 56, 61, 64, 65, 66, 67, 68, 69, 70, 71, 72, 73, 81 }

local GameVersion = require('Module:GameVersion')
local WikiAutomated = require('Module:WikiAutomated')

---@param version version? defaults to 'latest'
function p.getDataRoot(version)
    if version == nil then
        version = 'latest'
    end

    local ver = GameVersion.parseVersion(version, p['versions'])
    return mw.loadData('Module:Entities/Data/v' .. ver)
end

---@param version version? defaults to 'latest'
function p.getRawData(version)
    return p.getDataRoot(version)["data"]
end

---@param version version? defaults to 'latest'
function p.getData(version)
    local rawData = p.getRawData(version)

    local versionParsed = GameVersion.parseVersion(version, p.versions)
    local hasOverrideData, result = pcall(mw.loadData, 'Module:Entities/DataOverride')

    if hasOverrideData then
        local returnTable = rawData

        local defaultOverrideTable = result.default
        local versionOverrideTable = result[versionParsed]

        if defaultOverrideTable ~= nil then
            returnTable = WikiAutomated.tableExt.patch(returnTable, defaultOverrideTable)
        end

        if versionOverrideTable ~= nil then
            returnTable = WikiAutomated.tableExt.patch(returnTable, versionOverrideTable)
        end

        return returnTable
    else
        if not NO_OVERRIDE_DATA_WARNED then
            mw.log('Override data not found: ' .. result)
            NO_OVERRIDE_DATA_WARNED = true
        end

        return rawData
    end
end

---@class Entity
---@field mName string
---@field name string
---@field powerLevel number
---@field maxCount number
---@field isOutside boolean
---@field isDaytime boolean
---@field stunnable boolean
---@field stunTimeMultiplier number
---@field stunGameDifficultyMultiplier number
---@field doorSpeedMultiplier number
---@field canDie boolean
---@field destroyOnDeath boolean
---@field canSeeThroughFog boolean
---@field enemyHP string
---@field type 'daytime'|'nighttime'|'indoor'
local Entity = {}

local function getEntityType(entityData)
    if entityData.isOutside and entityData.isDaytime then
        return 'daytime'
    elseif entityData.isOutside then
        return 'nighttime'
    else
        return 'indoor'
    end
end

function Entity:new(_data)
    local data = {
        mName = _data.mName,
        name = _data.name,
        imageInContext = _data.imageInContext,
        imageIsolated = _data.imageIsolated,
        powerLevel = _data.powerLevel,
        diversityPowerLevel = _data.diversityPowerLevel,
        maxCount = _data.maxCount,
        isOutside = _data.isOutside,
        isDaytime = _data.isDaytime,
        waterType = _data.waterType,
        stunnable = _data.stunnable,
        stunTimeMultiplier = _data.stunTimeMultiplier,
        stunGameDifficultyMultiplier = _data.stunGameDifficultyMultiplier,
        doorSpeedMultiplier = _data.doorSpeedMultiplier,
        canDie = _data.canDie,
        destroyOnDeath = _data.destroyOnDeath,
        canSeeThroughFog = _data.canSeeThroughFog,
        enemyHP = _data.enemyHP,
    }
    data['type'] = getEntityType(data)

    setmetatable(data, self)
    self.__index = self
    return data
end

function p.getEntity(mName, version)
    local data = p.getData(version)

    if data[mName] == nil then
        error('Cannot find entity ' .. mName .. ' in version ' .. (version or 'nil'))
    end

    return Entity:new(data[mName])
end

function p.getEntityType(mName, version)
    return p.getEntity(mName, version).type
end

function p.getImageInContext(frame)
    return p.getEntity(frame.args[1]).imageInContext
end

function p.getImageIsolated(frame)
    return p.getEntity(frame.args[1]).imageIsolated
end

p['utils'] = {}

function p.utils.stunTimeMultiplierToSeconds(multiplier, version)
    local versionParsed = GameVersion.parseVersion(version, p.versions)

    local devices = {
        stunGrenade = nil,
        homemadeFlashbang = nil,
        radarBooster = nil,
    }

    -- stun grenade
    if versionParsed >= 35 then
        devices.stunGrenade = multiplier * 7.5
    end

    -- radar booster
    if versionParsed >= 45 then
        devices.radarBooster = multiplier * 1.75
    end

    -- homemade flashbang
    if versionParsed >= 45 then
        devices.homemadeFlashbang = multiplier * 7.5
    end

    return devices
end

function p.utils.doorSpeedMultiplierToSeconds(multiplier, version)
    local versionParsed = GameVersion.parseVersion(version, p.versions)

    return 1 / multiplier
end


return p
